meaning: n.[鍖籡鍥涜偄楹荤椆,鍥涜偄鐦棯
examples: My disability is called "quadriplegia," I use an electric wheelchair.
The mortality, quadriplegia and convulsion in group D were obviously higher than in group E.
Objective To study the clinical outcome and security of surgical treatment of senile cervical tuberculosis with quadriplegia.
